note: BEF is a Views exposed-form plugin with no global admin page (configure is null) — it is configured per view display. Cases are all `recipe` (response-graded): they probe load-bearing BEF facts (the `bef` exposed form plugin, widget ids, plugin types/namespaces, where config is stored, alter hook) that an agent would otherwise read source to answer. No live-state assertions.

evals.prompt: On a Drupal 11 view I want to use Better Exposed Filters. There is no admin config page. How do I turn BEF on for a display? Name the setting to change.
evals.expected_output: BEF has no global admin page; it is enabled per view display. In the display's Exposed form section set the Exposed form style to Better Exposed Filters (exposed form plugin id `bef`), then open its Settings.

evals.prompt: Where is a view's Better Exposed Filters configuration stored, and does `drush config:export` capture it? I want it to deploy with the view.
evals.expected_output: Settings live inside the display's exposed_form.options.bef config (schema in config/schema/better_exposed_filters.*.schema.yml). It is part of the view, so it exports/deploys with the view — no separate config entity, and drush config:export captures it.

evals.prompt: I have a taxonomy exposed filter rendered as a multi-select box in a Drupal view. Using Better Exposed Filters, which widget renders it as checkboxes, and what is that widget's plugin id?
evals.expected_output: Choose the Checkboxes/Radio buttons widget, whose plugin id is `bef`, in the filter's BEF widget selector. (Related filter widgets include bef_links, bef_single, bef_hidden, bef_number, bef_sliders.)

evals.prompt: I want a range slider on a numeric price exposed filter in a Drupal view using Better Exposed Filters. What is the widget id, and which JS library does the slider rely on?
evals.expected_output: Select the Sliders widget (plugin id `bef_sliders`); it uses the noUiSlider library (drupal/nouislider_js, attached via the better_exposed_filters/sliders library which depends on better_exposed_filters/nouislider).

evals.prompt: I want to add a custom Better Exposed Filters filter widget as a plugin in my Drupal module. What plugin namespace does the class go in, which attribute annotates it, and which base class should it extend?
evals.expected_output: Put the class under namespace Drupal\<module>\Plugin\better_exposed_filters\filter, annotate it with the #[FiltersWidget] attribute (Drupal\better_exposed_filters\Attribute\FiltersWidget; legacy annotation @BetterExposedFiltersFilterWidget), and extend FilterWidgetBase. Then clear caches so it appears in the widget selector.

evals.prompt: How many plugin types does Better Exposed Filters define for its widgets, and what are they? Name the manager service for the filter widgets.
evals.expected_output: BEF defines three widget plugin types — filter, pager, and sort — each with its own BetterExposedFiltersWidgetManager. The filter manager service is plugin.manager.better_exposed_filters_filter_widget.

evals.prompt: In code on a Drupal 11 site I want to force a Better Exposed Filters slider's min/max regardless of the stored view config. Which hook do I implement?
evals.expected_output: Implement hook_better_exposed_filters_options_alter(array &$options, ViewExecutable $view, DisplayPluginBase $displayHandler) and set the slider_options bef_slider_min / bef_slider_max on the relevant field key.

evals.prompt: I want to override the markup Better Exposed Filters uses to render a checkbox exposed filter in my Drupal theme. What Twig template do I copy, and where are BEF's theme hooks registered?
evals.expected_output: Copy bef-checkboxes.html.twig (theme hook bef_checkboxes) into your theme and clear caches. BEF's templates are registered via hook_theme in includes/better_exposed_filters.theme.inc, each with a template_preprocess_bef_*() function.
